name: hatch-plugins
description: Kerry Hatcher's AI tools marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: status-line
plugins.description: A rich terminal status line for Claude Code showing model, context usage, active tasks, and project state.

plugins.name: nobots
plugins.description: Humanize prose as Claude writes it, detect AI-sounding text on demand, and audit documents for AI writing tells - grounded in a research-backed field guide.

plugins.name: whachadoin
plugins.description: Log work, manage persistent cross-session todos, and answer "what am I working on" / "what did I work on last week" by driving the kwd CLI.
